title: The World Capital of French Fries Has a Problem: Too Many Potatoes
summary_full: Belgium’s potato harvest set a record, just as tariffs hit U.S. demand for frozen fries and as competition from suppliers in Asia intensified.
summary_public: Belgium’s potato harvest set a record, just as tariffs hit U.S. demand for frozen fries and as competition from suppliers in Asia intensified.

BE.label: neutral
BE.evidence: Belgium’s potato harvest set a record
